summary: is_demo Field Purge Verification - All 24 tests PASSED. Verified complete removal of is_demo field from all system ingress points: invitations.py, demo.py, schemas.py, auth.py. Demo seeding now uses deterministic demo_* ID namespace with zero is_demo field writes.
critical_code_review_comments: DEMO.PY VERIFIED: No is_demo field written anywhere - uses demo_* ID prefix namespace for cleanup
INVITATIONS.PY VERIFIED: No is_demo field - ownership scoped via invited_by (agent_id)
AUTH.PY VERIFIED: No is_demo field in any auth response (login, register, /me, /session)
SCHEMAS.PY VERIFIED: is_demo removed from all 7 Pydantic models (UserBase, Client, TeamMember, Document, ProjectStage, Activity, Notification)
DEMO ID NAMESPACE: All demo entities use demo_* prefix (demo_agent_001, demo_buyer_001, demo_proj_001, demo_client_001, demo_doc_001, etc.)
IDEMPOTENT SEED: Calling /api/demo/seed twice does not duplicate data - cleanup uses ID prefix regex
NO DEAD IMPORTS: No get_is_demo or get_demo_filter imports found in any route file
seed_data_creation: Demo seed creates: 3 users (1 agent + 2 buyers), 1 project, 2 clients, 2 units, 6 documents, 6 activities, 8 recipients, 1 reply, 4 team members, 1 timeline template + 5 steps, 1 timeline + 5 steps, 1 step document link, 1 internal note. All with demo_* prefixed IDs.
context_for_next_testing_agent: is_demo purge complete. All 24 tests passed verifying: (1) POST /api/demo/seed returns credentials without is_demo, (2) Seed is idempotent, (3) Demo agent/buyer logins work without is_demo, (4) /auth/me and /auth/session return no is_demo, (5) Team invitations work without is_demo, (6) Demo data relationships correct (project->clients->documents->activities), (7) Agent registration creates users without is_demo, (8) E2E agent can access projects/clients/documents without is_demo. Previous iterations: Phase 1-3, Notification Contract, P1 Legacy Cleanup, P1 Corrective Pass, Auth Surgery all passed.

demo_data_relationships.documents_linked: PASSED - 6+ demo documents linked to clients/project

demo_id_namespace.client_ids: PASSED - Demo clients use demo_client_001, demo_client_002
